title: Clout Nails 20mm (Pack of 100) Extra Large Head Galvanized Shed Roofing Felt Tacks for DIY and Crafts Home Decor Woodwork Furniture and Construction Outdoor Wood Fence Roof Tiles (20mm x 2mm)
features: HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - These Clout Nails are Zinc Plated Alloy Steel which is one of the highest forms of corrosion-resistant steel, making it last longer than other hardware. Adds extra protection and durability, as well as preventing rust from forming to enhance their lifespan.
ADVANTAGE – The distinctive feature of our tacks is their wide, flat head which provides a larger surface area for holding materials in place, minimizing the risk of tearing or damage.
EASY INSTALLATION - The user-friendly design of clout nails simplifies installation, allowing for quick and hassle-free attachment using standard hammers or nail guns.

UNIVERSAL APPLICATION – Long clout galvanised nails can be used in a wide range of applications, such as: For most repair jobs on sheds, summer houses, play houses, cabinet, furniture repair, carpentry, felt roofing, timber fence palings, installing skirting boards to plasterboard and other indoor / outdoor use.

SECURE HOLD - Flat head fence tack nails include a ribbed section near the head of the nail which provides more grip when nailed into harder surfaces, ensuring secure and reliable fixing. Size: Length 20 mm, Shank Diameter 2 mm. Pack of 100 pcs.
